message:
Fix: Add missing Execution/Rollback parsing in scanRequests

The scanRequests function (used by all list functions) was missing the
Execution and Rollback field parsing that scanRequest (for single request)
already had. This caused ListAllRequests, ListPendingRequests, etc. to
return requests with nil Execution/Rollback even when data existed in DB.

Also sync config defaults.go rm pattern with core/patterns.go fix
(order-independent -rf/-fr matching).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
